title: Closing
changes: 🐞 Revamped Bug Reporting: Introduced a dedicated, fully themed bug report screen replacing the basic email flow
🛠️ Guided Issue Submission: Added structured instructions prompting users to attach screenshots or screen recordings for faster diagnosis
📩 Reliable Support Channel: Optimized the send action to consistently route reports to modstoredeveloperteam@outlook.com using robust Android intents
🔢 Version Upgrade: Updated app version to v2.01.01 across all info panels and report metadata
🌙 Premium Dark Experience: Finalized permanent dark mode with a refined, consistent UI and removal of theme switching
🎨 Icon Enhancement: Preserved and secured the signature Crimson Red & Black premium app icon
🔐 Seamless Permissions Flow: Integrated required storage permissions directly into onboarding for a smooth first-time setup
🧬 Biometric Security Verified: Ensured stability and reliability of the biometric vault protection system
